# Artificial Studio: LLM Context Document

> This document is optimized for LLMs and AI Agents to understand Artificial Studio's architecture, mission, and projects in a single pass.

## Core Mission
Building interconnected, privacy-first AI ecosystems through edge computing and first-principles engineering.

## Primary Projects

### 1. ZenGuard AI
- **Type**: Privacy-First Mental Health Companion.
- **Problem**: Lack of privacy in cloud AI.
- **Tech**: Edge LLM (Gemma 3:4B), stateless architecture.
- **URL**: https://artificial-studio-main.vercel.app/projects.html

### 2. MOVIEFY
- **Type**: Career-Accelerating Content Curation.
- **Problem**: Digital noise and attention waste.
- **Tech**: Resume-driven matching algorithms.
- **URL**: https://moviefy-sandy.vercel.app/

### 3. Steady Pulse AI
- **Type**: Architectural Tone & Voice DNA Engine.
- **Problem**: Founder presence scaling issues.
- **Tech**: Linguistic signature neural networks.
- **URL**: https://steadypulseai.vercel.app/

## Technical Stack Summary
- **Frontend**: Vanilla JS, CSS3, Three.js, GSAP.
- **Intelligence**: Neural Networks, Edge LLMs, Sentiment Analytics.
- **Infrastructure**: Vercel Edge Runtime.

## Contact & Links
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/useriswild7099/ARTIFICIAL-STUDIO
- **Live**: https://artificial-studio-main.vercel.app/
- **Founder**: Prince Tigga
